true},\n235\t\t\t{`{\"message\": \"User not authorized\"}`, true},\n236\t\t\t{`{\"detail\": \"Access denied\"}`, true},\n237\t\t\t{`{\"error\": \"Permission denied\"}`, true},\n238\t\t\t{`{\"message\": \"Resource not found\"}`, false},\n239\t\t}\n240\t\n241\t\tpattern := \"(authentication|authorized?|access|permission).*(failed|denied)\"\n242\t\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n243\t\t\tmatches, _ := validate.ValidateErrorMessagePattern([]byte(tc.body), pattern, true)\n244\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Body: %s - Matches: %v\\n\", tc.body, matches)\n245\t\t}\n246\t\n247\t\t// Output:\n248\t\t// Body: {\"error\": \"Authentication failed\"} - Matches: true\n249\t\t// Body: {\"message\": \"User not authorized\"} - Matches: true\n250\t\t// Body: {\"detail\": \"Access denied\"} - Matches: true\n251\t\t// Body: {\"error\": \"Permission denied\"} - Matches: true\n252\t\t// Body: {\"message\": \"Resource not found\"} - Matches: false\n253\t}\n254\t\n255\t// ExampleErrorCodeInResponse_oauth2 demonstrates OAuth2 error code validation\n256\tfunc ExampleErrorCodeInResponse_oauth2() {\n257\t\t// Common OAuth2 error codes\n258\t\toauth2Errors := []struct {\n259\t\t\tbody      string\n260\t\t\terrorCode string\n261\t\t}{\n262\t\t\t{`{\"error\": \"invalid_token\", \"error_description\": \"The access token expired\"}`, \"invalid_token\"},\n263\t\t\t{`{\"error\": \"invalid_grant\", \"error_description\": \"Invalid authorization code\"}`, \"invalid_grant\"},\n264\t\t\t{`{\"error\": \"unauthorized_client\", \"error_description\": \"Client not authorized\"}`, \"unauthorized_client\"},\n265\t\t\t{`{\"error\": \"access_denied\", \"error_description\": \"Resource owner denied access\"}`, \"access_denied\"},\n266\t\t}\n267\t\n268\t\tfor _, tc := range oauth2Errors {\n269\t\t\tfound, _ := validate.ErrorCodeInResponse([]byte(tc.body), tc.errorCode)\n270\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Error code %s found: %v\\n\", tc.errorCode, found)\n271\t\t}\n272\t\n273\t\t// Output:\n274\t\t// Error code invalid_token found: true\n275\t\t// Error code invalid_grant found: true\n276\t\t// Error code unauthorized_client found: true\n277\t\t// Error code access_denied found: true\n278\t}\n279\t\n280\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRange demonstrates status code range validation\n281\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRange() {\n282\t\t// Simulate API responses with different status codes\n283\t\tresponses := []struct {\n284\t\t\tstatus int\n285\t\t\tdesc   string\n286\t\t}{\n287\t\t\t{200, \"OK\"},\n288\t\t\t{201, \"Created\"},\n289\t\t\t{204, \"No Content\"},\n290\t\t\t{400, \"Bad Request\"},\n291\t\t\t{401, \"Unauthorized\"},\n292\t\t\t{403, \"Forbidden\"},\n293\t\t\t{404, \"Not Found\"},\n294\t\t\t{500, \"Internal Server Error\"},\n295\t\t\t{502, \"Bad Gateway\"},\n296\t\t\t{503, \"Service Unavailable\"},\n297\t\t}\n298\t\n299\t\tfor _, resp := range responses {\n300\t\t\t// Check for success codes (2xx)\n301\t\t\tisSuccess := resp.status >= 200 && resp.status < 300\n302\t\n303\t\t\t// Check for client errors (4xx)\n304\t\t\tisClientError := resp.status >= 400 && resp.status < 500\n305\t\n306\t\t\t// Check for server errors (5xx)\n307\t\t\tisServerError := resp.status >= 500 && resp.status < 600\n308\t\n309\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%d (%s): Success=%v, ClientError=%v, ServerError=%v\\n\",\n310\t\t\t\tresp.status, resp.desc, isSuccess, isClientError, isServerError)\n311\t\t}\n312\t\n313\t\t// Output:\n314\t\t// 200 (OK): Success=true, ClientError=false, ServerError=false\n315\t\t// 201 (Created): Success=true, ClientError=false, ServerError=false\n316\t\t// 204 (No Content): Success=true, ClientError=false, ServerError=false\n317\t\t// 400 (Bad Request): Success=false, ClientError=true, ServerError=false\n318\t\t// 401 (Unauthorized): Success=false, ClientError=true, ServerError=false\n319\t\t// 403 (Forbidden): Success=false, ClientError=true, ServerError=false\n320\t\t// 404 (Not Found): Success=false, ClientError=true, ServerError=false\n321\t\t// 500 (Internal Server Error): Success=false, ClientError=false, ServerError=true\n322\t\t// 502 (Bad Gateway): Success=false, ClientError=false, ServerError=true\n323\t\t// 503 (Service Unavailable): Success=false, ClientError=false, ServerError=true\n324\t}\n325\t\n326\t// Status code and error message validation examples are demonstrated in other examples above\n327\t\n328\t// =============================================================================\n329\t// STATUS CODE RANGE INT VALIDATION EXAMPLES\n330\t// =============================================================================\n331\t\n332\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt demonstrates basic status code range validation using pattern strings\n333\t// with enhanced error reporting that includes range boundaries, distance from range, and suggestions.\n334\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt() {\n335\t\t// Validate that a status code falls within the 4xx range\n336\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", 404)\n337\t\tif err != nil {\n338\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n339\t\t} else {\n340\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"404 is valid in 4xx range\\n\")\n341\t\t}\n342\t\n343\t\t// Validate that a status code falls within the 5xx range\n344\t\terr = validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", 500)\n345\t\tif err != nil {\n346\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n347\t\t} else {\n348\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"500 is valid in 5xx range\\n\")\n349\t\t}\n350\t\n351\t\t// This returns an error because 200 is not in the 4xx range\n352\t\terr = validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", 200)\n353\t\tif err != nil {\n354\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n355\t\t}\n356\t\n357\t\t// Output:\n358\t\t// 404 is valid in 4xx range\n359\t\t// 500 is valid in 5xx range\n360\t\t// Validation failed: status_code_range validation failed\n361\t\t//   Expected: 4xx Client Error (400-499)\n362\t\t//   Actual:   200 (OK)\n363\t\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '4xx'\n364\t\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 4xx, Distance: 200 codes below range\n365\t\t//   Range:    4xx Client Error (400-499)\n366\t\t//   Details:\n367\t\t//     - Expected range: 400-499 (Client Error)\n368\t\t//     - Actual status code: 200\n369\t\t//     - Distance from valid range: 200 codes below range\n370\t\t//     - Range pattern context: 4xx\n371\t\t//     - Status code 200 is 200 codes below the minimum 400\n372\t\t//   Suggestions:\n373\t\t//     - The request succeeded - update test expectations if this is expected behavior\n374\t\t//     - Verify the test is checking for the correct response type\n375\t}\n376\t\n377\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_allRanges demonstrates validation across all status code ranges\n378\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_allRanges() {\n379\t\tstatusCodes := []int{100, 200, 301, 404, 500}\n380\t\tranges := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n381\t\n382\t\tfor _, code := range statusCodes {\n383\t\t\tfor _, pattern := range ranges {\n384\t\t\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(pattern, code)\n385\t\t\t\tif err == nil {\n386\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Status %d matches pattern %s\\n\", code, pattern)\n387\t\t\t\t\tbreak // Found the matching range\n388\t\t\t\t}\n389\t\t\t}\n390\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\t// Output:\n393\t\t// Status 100 matches pattern 1xx\n394\t\t// Status 200 matches pattern 2xx\n395\t\t// Status 301 matches pattern 3xx\n396\t\t// Status 404 matches pattern 4xx\n397\t\t// Status 500 matches pattern 5xx\n398\t}\n399\t\n400\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorHandling demonstrates proper error handling\n401\t// with detailed error information including range boundaries, distance, and suggestions.\n402\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorHandling() {\n403\t\ttestCases := []struct {\n404\t\t\tpattern string\n405\t\t\tactual  int\n406\t\t}{\n407\t\t\t{\"2xx\", 200}, // Success\n408\t\t\t{\"2xx\", 201}, // Success\n409\t\t\t{\"2xx\", 404}, // Error - not in range\n410\t\t\t{\"4xx\", 500}, // Error - not in range\n411\t\t\t{\"invalid\", 200}, // Error - invalid pattern\n412\t\t}\n413\t\n414\t\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n415\t\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n416\t\t\tif err != nil {\n417\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' vs %d: ERROR - %v\\n\", tc.pattern, tc.actual, err)\n418\t\t\t} else {\n419\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' vs %d: VALID\\n\", tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n420\t\t\t}\n421\t\t}\n422\t\n423\t\t// Output:\n424\t\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 200: VALID\n425\t\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 201: VALID\n426\t\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 404: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n427\t\t//   Expected: 2xx Success (200-299)\n428\t\t//   Actual:   404 (Not Found)\n429\t\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '2xx'\n430\t\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx, Distance: 105 codes above range\n431\t\t//   Range:    2xx Success (200-299)\n432\t\t//   Details:\n433\t\t//     - Expected range: 200-299 (Success)\n434\t\t//     - Actual status code: 404\n435\t\t//     - Distance from valid range: 105 codes above range\n436\t\t//     - Range pattern context: 2xx\n437\t\t//     - Status code 404 is 105 codes above the maximum 299\n438\t\t//   Suggestions:\n439\t\t//     - Review request parameters for errors\n440\t\t//     - Check authentication credentials\n441\t\t//     - Verify the resource exists and is accessible\n442\t\t//\n443\t\t// Pattern '4xx' vs 500: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n444\t\t//   Expected: 4xx Client Error (400-499)\n445\t\t//   Actual:   500 (Internal Server Error)\n446\t\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '4xx'\n447\t\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 4xx, Distance: 1 codes above range\n448\t\t//   Range:    4xx Client Error (400-499)\n449\t\t//   Details:\n450\t\t//     - Expected range: 400-499 (Client Error)\n451\t\t//     - Actual status code: 500\n452\t\t//     - Distance from valid range: 1 codes above range\n453\t\t//     - Range pattern context: 4xx\n454\t\t//     - Status code 500 is 1 codes above the maximum 499\n455\t\t//   Suggestions:\n456\t\t//     - Check if this is a temporary server issue\n457\t\t//     - Implement retry logic with backoff\n458\t\t//     - Verify service status and availability\n459\t\t//\n460\t\t// Pattern 'invalid' vs 200: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n461\t\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n462\t\t//   Actual:   'invalid' (7 chars)\n463\t\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format: invalid\n464\t\t//   Details:\n465\t\t//     - Pattern 'invalid' has invalid length\n466\t\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n467\t\t//     - Got 7 characters, expected 3\n468\t\t//   Suggestions:\n469\t\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n470\t}\n471\t\n472\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_realWorld demonstrates real-world usage patterns\n473\t// with enhanced error reporting that shows range boundaries, distance, and context.\n474\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_realWorld() {\n475\t\t// Simulate API response validation\n476\t\tvalidateResponse := func(statusCode int) {\n477\t\t\t// Check for success (2xx)\n478\t\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"2xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n479\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Request succeeded with status %d\\n\", statusCode)\n480\t\t\t\treturn\n481\t\t\t}\n482\t\n483\t\t\t// Check for client errors (4xx)\n484\t\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n485\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Client error with status %d - check request parameters\\n\", statusCode)\n486\t\t\t\treturn\n487\t\t\t}\n488\t\n489\t\t\t// Check for server errors (5xx)\n490\t\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n491\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Server error with status %d - retry later\\n\", statusCode)\n492\t\t\t\treturn\n493\t\t\t}\n494\t\n495\t\t\t// Check for redirects (3xx)\n496\t\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"3xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n497\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Redirect with status %d\\n\", statusCode)\n498\t\t\t\treturn\n499\t\t\t}\n500\t\n501\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Unexpected status code: %d\\n\", statusCode)\n502\t\t}\n503\t\n504\t\t// Test various response codes\n505\t\tvalidateResponse(200) // Success\n506\t\tvalidateResponse(404) // Client error\n507\t\tvalidateResponse(500) // Server error\n508\t\tvalidateResponse(301) // Redirect\n509\t\n510\t\t// Output:\n511\t\t// Request succeeded with status 200\n512\t\t// Client error with status 404 - check request parameters\n513\t\t// Server error with status 500 - retry later\n514\t\t// Redirect with status 301\n515\t}\n516\t\n517\t// ExampleParseStatusCodeRange demonstrates parsing status code range patterns\n518\tfunc ExampleParseStatusCodeRange() {\n519\t\tpatterns := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n520\t\n521\t\tfor _, pattern := range patterns {\n522\t\t\tmin, max, err := validate.ParseStatusCodeRange(pattern)\n523\t\t\tif err != nil {\n524\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Error parsing '%s': %v\\n\", pattern, err)\n525\t\t\t\tcontinue\n526\t\t\t}\n527\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' maps to range %d-%d\\n\", pattern, min, max)\n528\t\t}\n529\t\n530\t\t// Output:\n531\t\t// Pattern '1xx' maps to range 100-199\n532\t\t// Pattern '2xx' maps to range 200-299\n533\t\t// Pattern '3xx' maps to range 300-399\n534\t\t// Pattern '4xx' maps to range 400-499\n535\t\t// Pattern '5xx' maps to range 500-599\n536\t}\n537\t\n538\t// ExampleGetStatusCodeRangeDescription demonstrates getting descriptions for status code ranges\n539\tfunc ExampleGetStatusCodeRangeDescription() {\n540\t\tpatterns := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n541\t\n542\t\tfor _, pattern := range patterns {\n543\t\t\tdesc, err := validate.GetStatusCodeRangeDescription(pattern)\n544\t\t\tif err != nil {\n545\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Error getting description for '%s': %v\\n\", pattern, err)\n546\t\t\t\tcontinue\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s': %s\\n\", pattern, desc)\n549\t\t}\n550\t\n551\t\t// Output:\n552\t\t// Pattern '1xx': Informational (1xx)\n553\t\t// Pattern '2xx': Success (2xx)\n554\t\t// Pattern '3xx': Redirection (3xx)\n555\t\t// Pattern '4xx': Client Error (4xx)\n556\t\t// Pattern '5xx': Server Error (5xx)\n557\t}\n558\t\n559\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_restAPI demonstrates REST API validation scenarios\n560\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_restAPI() {\n561\t\t// Simulate REST API endpoint responses\n562\t\tresponses := []struct {\n563\t\t\tendpoint string\n564\t\t\tstatus   int\n565\t\t}{\n566\t\t\t{\"/users\", 200},           // GET - success\n567\t\t\t{\"/users\", 201},           // POST - created\n568\t\t\t{\"/users/123\", 404},       // GET - not found\n569\t\t\t{\"/users/123\", 403},       // PUT - forbidden\n570\t\t\t{\"/users\", 500},           // Any - server error\n571\t\t\t{\"/users\", 503},           // Any - unavailable\n572\t\t}\n573\t\n574\t\tfor _, resp := range responses {\n575\t\t\tswitch {\n576\t\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"2xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n577\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Success (%d)\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n578\t\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n579\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Client error (%d) - fix request\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n580\t\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n581\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Server error (%d) - retry later\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n582\t\t\tdefault:\n583\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Unexpected status %d\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n584\t\t\t}\n585\t\t}\n586\t\n587\t\t// Output:\n588\t\t// /users: Success (200)\n589\t\t// /users: Success (201)\n590\t\t// /users/123: Client error (404) - fix request\n591\t\t// /users/123: Client error (403) - fix request\n592\t\t// /users: Server error (500) - retry later\n593\t\t// /users: Server error (503) - retry later\n594\t}\n595\t\n596\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorMessages demonstrates detailed error messages\n597\tfunc '5xx'\n653\t\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 5xx, Distance: 199 codes below range\n654\t\t//   Range:    5xx Server Error (500-599)\n655\t\t//   Details:\n656\t\t//     - Expected range: 500-599 is 199 codes below the minimum 500\n661\t\t//   Suggestions:\n662\t\t//     - Review the unexpected status code\n663\t\t//     - Check API documentation for valid codes\n664\t\t//     - Verify the request is properly formatted\n665\t}\n666\t\n667\t// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_invalidPatterns demonstrates handling invalid patterns\n668\tfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_invalidPatterns() {\n669\t\tinvalidPatterns := []struct {\n670\t\t\tpattern string\n671\t\t\tactual  int\n672\t\t}{\n673\t\t\t{\"4x\", 404},      // Too short\n674\t\t\t{\"4xxx\", 404},    // Too long\n675\t\t\t{\"400\", 404},     // No 'xx' suffix\n676\t\t\t{\"0xx\", 4},       // Invalid century (0)\n677\t\t\t{\"6xx\", 600},     // Invalid century (6)\n678\t\t\t{\"9xx\", 900},     // Invalid century (9)\n679\t\t\t{\"xxx\", 404},     // Non-digit century\n680\t\t\t{\"\", 404},        // Empty pattern\n681\t\t}\n682\t\n683\t\tfor _, tc := range invalidPatterns {\n684\t\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n685\t\t\tif err != nil {\n686\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Invalid pattern '%s': %v\\n\", tc.pattern, err)\n687\t\t\t}\n688\t\t}\n689\t\n690\t\t// Output:\n691\t\t// Invalid pattern '4x': status_code_range validation failed\n692\t\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n693\t\t//   Actual:   '4x' (2 chars)\n694\t\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format: 4x\n695\t\t//   Details:\n696\t\t//     - Pattern '4x' has invalid length\n697\t\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n698\t\t//     - Got 2 characters, expected 3\n699\t\t//   Suggestions:\n700\t\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n701\t\t//\n702\t\t// Invalid pattern '4xxx': ServerError=true\n\t// 503 (Service Unavailable): Success=false, ClientError=false, ServerError=true\n}\n\n// Status code and error message validation examples are demonstrated in other examples above\n\n// =============================================================================\n// STATUS CODE RANGE INT VALIDATION EXAMPLES\n// =============================================================================\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt demonstrates basic status code range validation using pattern strings\n// with enhanced error reporting that includes range boundaries, distance from range, and suggestions.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt() {\n\t// Validate that a status code falls within the 4xx range\n\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", 404)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"404 is valid in 4xx range\\n\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate that a status code falls within the 5xx range\n\terr = validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", 500)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"500 is valid in 5xx range\\n\")\n\t}\n\n\t// This returns an error because 200 is not in the 4xx range\n\terr = validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", 200)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\\n\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// 404 is valid in 4xx range\n\t// 500 is valid in 5xx range\n\t// Validation failed: status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 4xx Client Error (400-499)\n\t//   Actual:   200 (OK)\n\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '4xx'\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 4xx, Distance: 200 codes below range\n\t//   Range:    4xx Client Error (400-499)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 400-499 (Client Error)\n\t//     - Actual status code: 200\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 200 codes below range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 4xx\n\t//     - Status code 200 is 200 codes below the minimum 400\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - The request succeeded - update test expectations if this is expected behavior\n\t//     - Verify the test is checking for the correct response type\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_allRanges demonstrates validation across all status code ranges\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_allRanges() {\n\tstatusCodes := []int{100, 200, 301, 404, 500}\n\tranges := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n\n\tfor _, code := range statusCodes {\n\t\tfor _, pattern := range ranges {\n\t\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(pattern, code)\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Status %d matches pattern %s\\n\", code, pattern)\n\t\t\t\tbreak // Found the matching range\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Status 100 matches pattern 1xx\n\t// Status 200 matches pattern 2xx\n\t// Status 301 matches pattern 3xx\n\t// Status 404 matches pattern 4xx\n\t// Status 500 matches pattern 5xx\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorHandling demonstrates proper error handling\n// with detailed error information including range boundaries, distance, and suggestions.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorHandling() {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tpattern string\n\t\tactual  int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"2xx\", 200}, // Success\n\t\t{\"2xx\", 201}, // Success\n\t\t{\"2xx\", 404}, // Error - not in range\n\t\t{\"4xx\", 500}, // Error - not in range\n\t\t{\"invalid\", 200}, // Error - invalid pattern\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' vs %d: ERROR - %v\\n\", tc.pattern, tc.actual, err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' vs %d: VALID\\n\", tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 200: VALID\n\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 201: VALID\n\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 404: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 2xx Success (200-299)\n\t//   Actual:   404 (Not Found)\n\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '2xx'\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx, Distance: 105 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    2xx Success (200-299)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 200-299 (Success)\n\t//     - Actual status code: 404\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 105 codes above range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 2xx\n\t//     - Status code 404 is 105 codes above the maximum 299\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Review request parameters for errors\n\t//     - Check authentication credentials\n\t//     - Verify the resource exists and is accessible\n\t//\n\t// Pattern '4xx' vs 500: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 4xx Client Error (400-499)\n\t//   Actual:   500 (Internal Server Error)\n\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '4xx'\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 4xx, Distance: 1 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    4xx Client Error (400-499)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 400-499 (Client Error)\n\t//     - Actual status code: 500\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 1 codes above range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 4xx\n\t//     - Status code 500 is 1 codes above the maximum 499\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Check if this is a temporary server issue\n\t//     - Implement retry logic with backoff\n\t//     - Verify service status and availability\n\t//\n\t// Pattern 'invalid' vs 200: ERROR - status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n\t//   Actual:   'invalid' (7 chars)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format: invalid\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern 'invalid' has invalid length\n\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n\t//     - Got 7 characters, expected 3\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_realWorld demonstrates real-world usage patterns\n// with enhanced error reporting that shows range boundaries, distance, and context.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_realWorld() {\n\t// Simulate API response validation\n\tvalidateResponse := func(statusCode int) {\n\t\t// Check for success (2xx)\n\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"2xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Request succeeded with status %d\\n\", statusCode)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check for client errors (4xx)\n\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Client error with status %d - check request parameters\\n\", statusCode)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check for server errors (5xx)\n\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Server error with status %d - retry later\\n\", statusCode)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check for redirects (3xx)\n\t\tif err := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"3xx\", statusCode); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Redirect with status %d\\n\", statusCode)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Unexpected status code: %d\\n\", statusCode)\n\t}\n\n\t// Test various response codes\n\tvalidateResponse(200) // Success\n\tvalidateResponse(404) // Client error\n\tvalidateResponse(500) // Server error\n\tvalidateResponse(301) // Redirect\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Request succeeded with status 200\n\t// Client error with status 404 - check request parameters\n\t// Server error with status 500 - retry later\n\t// Redirect with status 301\n}\n\n// ExampleParseStatusCodeRange demonstrates parsing status code range patterns\nfunc ExampleParseStatusCodeRange() {\n\tpatterns := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n\n\tfor _, pattern := range patterns {\n\t\tmin, max, err := validate.ParseStatusCodeRange(pattern)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Error parsing '%s': %v\\n\", pattern, err)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' maps to range %d-%d\\n\", pattern, min, max)\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Pattern '1xx' maps to range 100-199\n\t// Pattern '2xx' maps to range 200-299\n\t// Pattern '3xx' maps to range 300-399\n\t// Pattern '4xx' maps to range 400-499\n\t// Pattern '5xx' maps to range 500-599\n}\n\n// ExampleGetStatusCodeRangeDescription demonstrates getting descriptions for status code ranges\nfunc ExampleGetStatusCodeRangeDescription() {\n\tpatterns := []string{\"1xx\", \"2xx\", \"3xx\", \"4xx\", \"5xx\"}\n\n\tfor _, pattern := range patterns {\n\t\tdesc, err := validate.GetStatusCodeRangeDescription(pattern)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Error getting description for '%s': %v\\n\", pattern, err)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s': %s\\n\", pattern, desc)\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Pattern '1xx': Informational (1xx)\n\t// Pattern '2xx': Success (2xx)\n\t// Pattern '3xx': Redirection (3xx)\n\t// Pattern '4xx': Client Error (4xx)\n\t// Pattern '5xx': Server Error (5xx)\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_restAPI demonstrates REST API validation scenarios\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_restAPI() {\n\t// Simulate REST API endpoint responses\n\tresponses := []struct {\n\t\tendpoint string\n\t\tstatus   int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"/users\", 200},           // GET - success\n\t\t{\"/users\", 201},           // POST - created\n\t\t{\"/users/123\", 404},       // GET - not found\n\t\t{\"/users/123\", 403},       // PUT - forbidden\n\t\t{\"/users\", 500},           // Any - server error\n\t\t{\"/users\", 503},           // Any - unavailable\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, resp := range responses {\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"2xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Success (%d)\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"4xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Client error (%d) - fix request\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n\t\tcase validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(\"5xx\", resp.status) == nil:\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Server error (%d) - retry later\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"%s: Unexpected status %d\\n\", resp.endpoint, resp.status)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// /users: Success (200)\n\t// /users: Success (201)\n\t// /users/123: Client error (404) - fix request\n\t// /users/123: Client error (403) - fix request\n\t// /users: Server error (500) - retry later\n\t// /users: Server error (503) - retry later\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorMessages demonstrates detailed error messages\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_errorMessages() {\n\t// Show descriptive error messages for various mismatches\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tpattern string\n\t\tactual  int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"2xx\", 404},\n\t\t{\"4xx\", 200},\n\t\t{\"5xx\", 301},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Pattern '%s' vs %d: %v\\n\", tc.pattern, tc.actual, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Pattern '2xx' vs 404: status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 2xx Success (200-299)\n\t//   Actual:   404 (Not Found)\n\t//   Context:  status code validation failed for pattern '2xx'\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx, Distance: 105 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    2xx Success (200-299)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 200-299 (Success)\n\t//     - Actual status code: Distance: 200 codes below range\n\t//   Range:    4xx Client Error (400-499)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 400-499 (Client Error)\n\t//     - Actual status code: 200\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 200 codes below range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 4xx\n\t//     - Status code 200 is 200 codes below the minimum 400\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - The request succeeded - update test expectations if this is expected behavior\n\t//     - Verify the test is checking for the correct response type\n\t//\n\t// Pattern '5xx' vs 301: status_code_range validation Distance: 199 codes below range\n\t//   Range:    5xx Server Error (500-599)\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 500-599 (Server Error)\n\t//     - Actual status code: 301\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 199 codes below range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 5xx\n\t//     - Status code 301 is 199 codes below the minimum 500\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Review the unexpected status code\n\t//     - Check API documentation for valid codes\n\t//     - Verify the request is properly formatted\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_invalidPatterns demonstrates handling invalid patterns\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeInt_invalidPatterns() {\n\tinvalidPatterns := []struct {\n\t\tpattern string\n\t\tactual  int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"4x\", 404},      // Too short\n\t\t{\"4xxx\", 404},    // Too long\n\t\t{\"400\", 404},     // No 'xx' suffix\n\t\t{\"0xx\", 4},       // Invalid century (0)\n\t\t{\"6xx\", 600},     // Invalid century (6)\n\t\t{\"9xx\", 900},     // Invalid century (9)\n\t\t{\"xxx\", 404},     // Non-digit century\n\t\t{\"\", 404},        // Empty pattern\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range invalidPatterns {\n\t\terr := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeInt(tc.pattern, tc.actual)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Invalid pattern '%s': %v\\n\", tc.pattern, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Invalid pattern '4x': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n\t//   Actual:   '4x' (2 chars)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format: 4x\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '4x' has invalid length\n\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n\t//     - Got 2 characters, expected 3\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '4xxx': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n\t//   Actual:   '4xxx' (4 chars)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format: 4xxx\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '4xxx' has invalid length\n\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n\t//     - Got 4 characters, expected 3\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '400': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: pattern ending with 'xx'\n\t//   Actual:   '00'\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern suffix in '400'\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '400' has invalid suffix\n\t//     - Pattern must end with 'xx' (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n\t//     - Got '00', expected 'xx'\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '0xx': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: century digit 1-5\n\t//   Actual:   '0' (ASCII 48)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern century in '0xx'\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '0xx' has invalid century digit\n\t//     - Valid century digits: 1 (1xx), 2 (2xx), 3 (3xx), 4 (4xx), 5 (5xx)\n\t//     - Got '0', expected digit between '1' and '5'\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '6xx': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: century digit 1-5\n\t//   Actual:   '6' (ASCII 54)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern century in '6xx'\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '6xx' has invalid century digit\n\t//     - Valid century digits: 1 (1xx), 2 (2xx), 3 (3xx), 4 (4xx), 5 (5xx)\n\t//     - Got '6', expected digit between '1' and '5'\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '9xx': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: century digit 1-5\n\t//   Actual:   '9' (ASCII 57)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern century in '9xx'\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '9xx' has invalid century digit\n\t//     - Valid century digits: 1 (1xx), 2 (2xx), 3 (3xx), 4 (4xx), 5 (5xx)\n\t//     - Got '9', expected digit between '1' and '5'\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern 'xxx': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: century digit 1-5\n\t//   Actual:   'x' (ASCII 120)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern century in 'xxx'\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern 'xxx' has invalid century digit\n\t//     - Valid century digits: 1 (1xx), 2 (2xx), 3 (3xx), 4 (4xx), 5 (5xx)\n\t//     - Got 'x', expected digit between '1' and '5'\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n\t//\n\t// Invalid pattern '': status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: pattern in format 'Nxx' (3 chars)\n\t//   Actual:   '' (0 chars)\n\t//   Context:  invalid pattern format:\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Pattern '' has invalid length\n\t//     - Pattern must be exactly 3 characters (e.g., '4xx', '5xx')\n\t//     - Got 0 characters, expected 3\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Verify the response format is correct\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails demonstrates enhanced range validation error reporting\n// with comprehensive information about range boundaries, distance from range, and pattern context.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails() {\n\t// Create a response with status 200\n\tresp := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\tresp.Code = 200\n\thttpResp := resp.Result()\n\n\t// Validate against 4xx range with detailed error information\n\tresult := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails(httpResp, validate.Range4xx)\n\n\t// The result includes comprehensive error information\n\tfmt.Printf(\"Valid: %v\\n\", result.Valid)\n\tfmt.Printf(\"Actual code: %d\\n\", result.ActualCode)\n\tfmt.Printf(\"Category: %s\\n\", result.Category)\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Valid: false\n\t// Actual code: 200\n\t// Category: Client Error\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails_customRanges demonstrates range validation\n// with custom status code ranges and detailed error reporting.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails_customRanges() {\n\t// Define custom ranges for specific use cases\n\tcustomRange := validate.StatusCodeRange{\n\t\tMin:         200,\n\t\tMax:         204,\n\t\tDescription: \"Standard success responses\",\n\t}\n\n\t// Test responses against custom range\n\ttestCodes := []int{200, 201, 204, 206, 400, 500}\n\n\tfor _, code := range testCodes {\n\t\tresp := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\t\tresp.Code = code\n\t\thttpResp := resp.Result()\n\n\t\tresult := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails(httpResp, customRange)\n\n\t\tif !result.Valid {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Status %d: Invalid (distance: %s)\\n\", code, result.MismatchDetails)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Status %d: Valid within range %d-%d\\n\", code, customRange.Min, customRange.Max)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Status 200: Valid within range 200-204\n\t// Status 201: Valid within range 200-204\n\t// Status 204: Valid within range 200-204\n\t// Status 206: Invalid (distance: status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Actual:   206 (Partial Content)\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx range (custom), Distance: 2 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 200-204 Standard success responses\n\t//     - Actual status code: 206\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 2 codes above range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 2xx range (custom)\n\t//     - Status code 206 is 2 codes above the maximum 204\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - The request succeeded - update test expectations if this is expected behavior\n\t//     - Verify the test is checking for the correct response type\n\t// )\n\t// Status 400: Invalid (distance: status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Actual:   400 (Bad Request)\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx range (custom), Distance: 196 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 200-204 Standard success responses\n\t//     - Actual status code: 400\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 196 codes above range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 2xx range (custom)\n\t//     - Status code 400 is 196 codes above the maximum 204\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Review request parameters for errors\n\t//     - Check authentication credentials\n\t//     - Verify the resource exists and is accessible\n\t// )\n\t// Status 500: Invalid (distance: status_code_range validation failed\n\t//   Expected: 200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Actual:   500 (Internal Server Error)\n\t//   Pattern:  Range pattern: 2xx range (custom), Distance: 296 codes above range\n\t//   Range:    200-204 (Standard success responses) - 2xx range (custom) pattern\n\t//   Details:\n\t//     - Expected range: 200-204 Standard success responses\n\t//     - Actual status code: 500\n\t//     - Distance from valid range: 296 codes above range\n\t//     - Range pattern context: 2xx range (custom)\n\t//     - Status code 500 is 296 codes above the maximum 204\n\t//   Suggestions:\n\t//     - Check if this is a temporary server issue\n\t//     - Implement retry logic with backoff\n\t//     - Verify service status and availability\n\t// )\n}\n\n// ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails_allStandardRanges demonstrates validation\n// across all standard HTTP status code ranges with detailed error information.\nfunc ExampleValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails_allStandardRanges() {\n\tstandardRanges := []validate.StatusCodeRange{\n\t\tvalidate.Range1xx,\n\t\tvalidate.Range2xx,\n\t\tvalidate.Range3xx,\n\t\tvalidate.Range4xx,\n\t\tvalidate.Range5xx,\n\t}\n\n\ttestStatuses := []int{100, 200, 301, 404, 500}\n\n\tfor _, status := range testStatuses {\n\t\tfor _, statusRange := range standardRanges {\n\t\t\tresp := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\t\t\tresp.Code = status\n\t\t\thttpResp := resp.Result()\n\n\t\t\tresult := validate.ValidateStatusCodeRangeWithDetails(httpResp, statusRange)\n\n\t\t\tif result.Valid {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"Status %d matches %s range (%d-%d)\\n\",\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus, statusRange.Description, statusRange.Min, statusRange.Max)\n\t\t\t\tbreak // Found the matching range\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Output:\n\t// Status 100 matches Informational range (100-199)\n\t// Status 200 matches Success range (200-299)\n\t// Status 301 matches Redirection range (300-399)\n\t// Status 404 matches Client Error range (400-499)\n\t// Status
